title: Linguine with Harissa, Shrimp, and Parmigiano Reggiano
instructions: Prep ingredients and cook pasta (reserve pasta water).
Cook pepper and shrimp, then set aside.
Sauté onion and garlic, add harissa, then tomatoes and spices. Simmer.
Combine pasta, shrimp, and sauce. Adjust with pasta water.
Finish with olive oil, parmesan, and basil.

title: Stir-fry with Pork Tenderloin and Oyster Sauce
instructions: Cook jasmine rice for 10–12 minutes, drain and keep warm.
Prep vegetables: slice pepper, broccolini, scallions; mince garlic and ginger.
Stir-fry white scallions, then add pepper and broccolini.
Add garlic, ginger, oyster sauce, bouillon, and water. Simmer, then add bean sprouts.
Sear pork in butter, add onion chutney and remaining water.
Serve rice with vegetables, sliced pork, sauce, sesame seeds, and scallion greens.

title: Sticky Turkey with Vegetable Soup
instructions: Prepare bouillon. Slice onion, garlic, pepper, and carrot.
Cook onion, garlic, carrot in butter. Add potatoes.
Add paprika, bay leaf, vinegar, and bouillon. Simmer 12–15 minutes.
Cook turkey with paprika and pepper strips. Add honey and slice.
Mix yogurt with vinegar and chop chives.
Blend soup with roasted pepper sauce and ketjap.
Serve soup topped with turkey, yogurt drizzle, and chives.

title: Bulgur Bowl with Avocado and White Cheese
ingredients: Extra virgin olive oil to taste
instructions: Prepare bouillon. Slice onion, cucumber, and tomatoes.
Cook bulgur in bouillon for 10–12 minutes, then drain.
Toast almonds. Caramelize onions in olive oil.
Chop herbs, slice avocado, crumble cheese, chop pepper.
Mix vegetables, vinegar, spices, bulgur, onions, and herbs.
Serve topped with avocado, almonds, cheese, cranberries, and herbs.

title: Flatbread with Pork Tenderloin and Feta Sauce
instructions: Pickle onion with vinegar and honey.
Slice aubergine, garlic, and pork.
Cook aubergine with garlic until soft.
Cook pork with spices and onion.
Prepare cucumber, herbs, tomato, and warm flatbread.
Mix feta, yogurt, cucumber, and herbs into sauce.
Assemble flatbreads with fillings and serve.

title: Fusion Risotto with Miso and Parmigiano Reggiano
instructions: Boil eggs for 6–8 minutes and cool. Prepare miso bouillon.
Sauté mushrooms, white scallions, and garlic. Add rice and toast.
Gradually add miso bouillon and cook risotto for 25–30 minutes.
Sauté broccolini and prepare lime dressing with soy beans and herbs.
Mix mascarpone and Parmigiano into risotto.
Serve risotto topped with broccolini salad and egg halves.
Finish with chili oil, sesame seeds, and remaining herbs.

title: Pumpkin Soup with Beurre Noisette, Sage, and Croutons
instructions: Sauté onion in olive oil and prepare bouillon.
Cook pumpkin, carrot, sweet potato, garlic, and thyme. Add vinegar, honey, and bouillon. Simmer.
Make croutons from ciabatta with garlic and olive oil.
Blend soup until smooth and season.
Fry sage and thyme in butter until golden, add pumpkin seeds.
Serve soup with crème fraîche, croutons, and sage butter topping.
